Details: Removal of 4-nonylphenol from water by coagulation, clarification, and filtration was found to be ineffective.  Less than 33 percent removal was reported in multiple samples collected over period of three months in one study.  Another study reported no removal of 4-nonylphenol by conventional treatment.  Aluminum sulfate coagulant showed better removal (10 to 33 percent) compared to ferric chloride (0 percent).
